name: blog-writing-skills
description: Technical and B2B blog writing skills for Codex: brainstorm, research, pressure-test, outline, draft, fact-check, and review source-backed articles.

interface.shortDescription: Source-backed technical and B2B article workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-compatible Agent Skills bundle for technical and B2B content production. It supports Trellis-like brainstorm workspaces, Tavily-backed research, strategy pressure testing, context packs, outlines, drafts, fact checking, and editorial review.
defaultPrompt: Write a technical article with Tavily research.
Grill this article angle before drafting.
